title: BANK OF AI LLM API
subtitle: OpenAI-compatible LLM inference
description: BANK OF AI LLM API provides paid access to first-party model inference through x402. It exposes model discovery, OpenAI-compatible chat completions, and Claude-compatible messages so agents, scripts, and applications can call LLMs without embedding an upstream BANK OF AI API key.
useCase: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs on-demand LLM inference with x402 payment. Start with /v1/models to choose a model, then call /v1/chat/completions for OpenAI-style requests or /v1/messages for Claude-style message payloads.

zh-CN.title: BANK OF AI 大模型 API
zh-CN.subtitle: 兼容 OpenAI 的大模型推理接口
zh-CN.description: BANK OF AI 大模型 API 通过 x402 提供付费模型推理能力，包含模型发现、OpenAI-compatible 聊天补全和 Claude-compatible Messages。调用方不需要暴露上游 BANK OF AI API key，可以通过 CLI、Agent 或应用按次支付调用。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要按次付费调用大模型的应用、Agent 和命令行流程。先用 /v1/models 查询可用模型，再用 /v1/chat/completions 发起 OpenAI 风格请求，或用 /v1/messages 发起 Claude 风格消息请求。

endpoints.title: List Models
endpoints.subtitle: Available LLM models
endpoints.description: Return the BANK OF AI models currently exposed by the gateway, including identifiers that can be used in subsequent generation requests.
endpoints.useCase: Call this endpoint before chat or messages requests when you need to inspect available model IDs or verify gateway access.

zh-CN.title: 模型列表
zh-CN.subtitle: 可用大模型
zh-CN.description: 返回当前 gateway 暴露的 BANK OF AI 模型列表，结果中的模型 ID 可用于后续生成请求。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合在聊天补全或 Messages 请求前查询可用模型 ID，或验证 gateway 是否可正常访问。

endpoints.title: Chat Completions
endpoints.subtitle: Conversational generation
endpoints.description: Create an OpenAI-compatible chat completion from a messages array, model ID, and generation options.
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint for assistant-style chat, agent reasoning loops, tool orchestration, content generation, and other OpenAI-compatible integrations.

zh-CN.title: 聊天补全
zh-CN.subtitle: 对话式生成
zh-CN.description: 基于 messages 数组、模型 ID 和生成参数创建 OpenAI-compatible 聊天补全结果。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合对话助手、Agent 推理循环、工具编排、内容生成，以及其他兼容 OpenAI 接口的集成场景。

endpoints.title: Messages
endpoints.subtitle: Claude-compatible messages
endpoints.description: Create a Claude-compatible response using an Anthropic-style messages payload.
endpoints.useCase: Use this endpoint when your client or prompt stack already follows the Anthropic Messages API shape.

zh-CN.title: Messages
zh-CN.subtitle: Claude-compatible 消息接口
zh-CN.description: 使用 Anthropic 风格的 messages payload 创建 Claude-compatible 响应。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合已有客户端、Prompt 栈或 Agent 框架按 Anthropic Messages API 形态组织请求的场景。
